	    	><h2><b>NTU hidden gems</b></h2>
<hr />
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Unpopular opinion: </span><b>NTU</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> is pretty cool if we weren’t so hung up on travelling 2 hours to the far-off west. But then again, all good things are worth travelling for, right? From secret art trails to cheap eats, NTU has tons of untapped potential even its students – including myself – don’t know about.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">The best thing is, these places are very much open to the public. So if you’ve ever wanted to know just what in the world goes on at </span><em><span style="font-weight: 400;">Pulau </span></em><span style="font-weight: 400;">NTU, rest assured, it’s so much more than the “dim sum” building or </span><a href="https://thesmartlocal.com/read/yunnan-garden/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Yunnan Gardens</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">. </span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Here are some of its best lesser-known photo spots, activities, and food. </span></p>
<hr />
<h3 style="text-align: center;"><b>– Photospots –</b></h3>
<hr />
<h3><b>1. Sci-fi gardenscape at Academic Building North</b></h3>
<hr />
<p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" decoding="async" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-249142" src="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-11.png" alt="NTU - Academic Building North" width="1335" height="1999" srcset="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-11.png 1335w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-11-200x300.png 200w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-11-684x1024.png 684w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-11-100x150.png 100w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-11-768x1150.png 768w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-11-1026x1536.png 1026w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-11-307x460.png 307w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-11-334x500.png 334w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-11-174x260.png 174w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-11-93x140.png 93w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-11-47x70.png 47w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-11-223x334.png 223w" sizes="(max-width: 1335px) 100vw, 1335px" /><br />
Image credit: </span><a href="https://m.facebook.com/NTUsg/photos/a.190433687662484/2018532194852615/?type=3&locale2=de_DE" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Kevin Lee</span></a></em></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Nestled between the School of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering and the School of Computer Science is a little garden of eden called the </span><b>Academic Building North</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> (ABN). From highly efficient LED lighting to windflow and daylight-maximising architecture, the ABN is one of Singapore’s greenest buildings. </span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Visually, it also has a very green interior, thanks to all the plants that thrive under the building’s unique octagonal sunroof. By day, it looks like a secret garden, but by night, it’s a sci-fi fantasy.</span></p>
<p><span style="color: #d47978;"><b>Address</b></span><span style="font-weight: 400;"><strong><span style="color: #d47978;">:</span></strong> 61 Nanyang Drive, Singapore 637335</span></p>
<hr />
<h3><b>2. Zen pool & sky roof at The Arc</b></h3>
<hr />
<p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" decoding="async" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-249143" src="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-1.png" alt="NTU - The Arc" width="1999" height="1047" srcset="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-1.png 1999w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-1-300x157.png 300w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-1-1024x536.png 1024w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-1-150x79.png 150w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-1-768x402.png 768w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-1-1536x804.png 1536w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-1-690x361.png 690w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-1-955x500.png 955w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-1-310x162.png 310w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-1-400x210.png 400w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-1-210x110.png 210w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-1-90x47.png 90w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-1-480x251.png 480w" sizes="(max-width: 1999px) 100vw, 1999px" /><br />
Image adapted from: </span><a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CFUjAKYsWd3/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">@danielrahmatcipta</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">, </span><a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/Cd7_fcUvXci/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">@jiatlormee</span></a></em></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">You might have heard of NTU’s Hive Building, or “dim sum” building, but few know of </span><b>The Arc</b><span style="font-weight: 400;">, NTU’s other learning hub equipped with 6 storeys of smart classrooms. At its core is a silver, winding staircase that leads to a shallow pool and open courtyard. </span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">It’s the picture of </span><em><span style="font-weight: 400;">zen</span></em><span style="font-weight: 400;">, which is probably a big contrast from all the intense studying going on upstairs. Just be sure to keep your decibels down when visiting The Arc, in consideration of the students and staff. </span></p>	<div>
		<iframe id="answers-client-6a2671fc474a7" class="answers-client" src="" height="500" loading="lazy" frameborder="0" scrolling="no"></iframe>

</p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="color: #d47978;"><b>Address</b></span><strong><span style="color: #d47978;">:</span></strong> </span><span style="font-weight: 400;">63 Nanyang Drive, Singapore 636922</span></p>
<hr />
<h3><b>3. Moving art show at Media Art Nexus</b></h3>
<hr />
<p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-249144" src="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-6.png" alt="NTU - Media Art Nexus" width="960" height="640" srcset="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-6.png 960w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-6-300x200.png 300w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-6-150x100.png 150w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-6-768x512.png 768w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-6-690x460.png 690w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-6-750x500.png 750w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-6-310x207.png 310w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-6-400x267.png 400w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-6-210x140.png 210w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-6-90x60.png 90w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-6-480x320.png 480w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 960px) 100vw, 960px" /><br />
Image credit: </span><a href="https://www.wavesart.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Waves Art</span></a></em></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Although the </span><b>Media Art Nexus</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> (MAN) is located in the most prevalent part of NTU, the North Spine, many often miss the installation in their hurry to the bus-stop. But if you’re not in a rush, there are a few benches opposite the display for you to sit down and enjoy a quick art show.</span></p>
<p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-249145" src="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-8.png" alt="NTU - Media Art Nexus" width="1999" height="1335" srcset="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-8.png 1999w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-8-300x200.png 300w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-8-1024x684.png 1024w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-8-150x100.png 150w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-8-768x513.png 768w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-8-1536x1026.png 1536w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-8-690x460.png 690w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-8-749x500.png 749w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-8-310x207.png 310w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-8-400x267.png 400w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-8-210x140.png 210w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-8-90x60.png 90w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-8-480x321.png 480w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1999px) 100vw, 1999px" /><br />
Image credit: </span><a href="https://www.mediaartnexus.com/?p=307#jp-carousel-3372" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Media Art Nexus</span></a></em></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">The MAN can be found along the linkway between North Spine Plaza and The Arc. Depending on when you visit, look out for a series of community art projects by NTU Museum and the School of Art Design and Media.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="color: #d47978;"><b>Address</b></span><strong><span style="color: #d47978;">:</span></strong> </span><span style="font-weight: 400;">North Spine Plaza, NTU Singapore, Singapore 639798</span></p>
<hr />
<h3 style="text-align: center;"><b>– Activities –</b></h3>
<hr />
<h3><b>4. Free-entry museum at Chinese Heritage Centre</b></h3>
<hr />
<p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-249146" src="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-4.png" alt="NTU - Chinese Heritage Centre" width="1999" height="1047" srcset="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-4.png 1999w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-4-300x157.png 300w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-4-1024x536.png 1024w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-4-150x79.png 150w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-4-768x402.png 768w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-4-1536x804.png 1536w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-4-690x361.png 690w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-4-955x500.png 955w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-4-310x162.png 310w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-4-400x210.png 400w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-4-210x110.png 210w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-4-90x47.png 90w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-4-480x251.png 480w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1999px) 100vw, 1999px" /><br />
Image adapted from: </span><a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CMrib6QFfcV/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">@yoyiko_san</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">, </span><a href="https://www.visitsingapore.com/see-do-singapore/culture-heritage/heritage-discovery/chinese-heritage-centre/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Chinese Heritage Centre</span></a></em></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Did you know that there’s a whole museum in the </span><b>Chinese Heritage Centre</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> (CHC) at Yunnan Gardens? Many often see the lofty Chinese building in the backdrop, but don’t venture inside. </span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">But if you take some time to explore it, you’ll get to enjoy a free, permanent exhibition called Chinese More or Less: An Exhibition on Overseas Chinese Identity</span> <span style="font-weight: 400;">in the CHC. It features photographs, documents, and stories that outline Chinese history, with particular focus on Peranakan and Straits Chinese.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="color: #d47978;"><b>Address</b></span><strong><span style="color: #d47978;">:</span></strong> </span><span style="font-weight: 400;">46 Nanyang Avenue, Singapore 639817</span></p>
<hr />
<h3><b>5. Industrial oasis at Jurong Eco Garden</b></h3>
<hr />
<p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-249147" src="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-2.png" alt="NTU - Jurong Eco Garden" width="1600" height="1200" srcset="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-2.png 1600w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-2-300x225.png 300w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-2-1024x768.png 1024w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-2-150x113.png 150w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-2-768x576.png 768w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-2-1536x1152.png 1536w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-2-613x460.png 613w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-2-667x500.png 667w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-2-310x233.png 310w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-2-400x300.png 400w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-2-187x140.png 187w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-2-90x68.png 90w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-2-445x334.png 445w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1600px) 100vw, 1600px" /><br />
Image credit: </span><a href="https://hikingthegreenisle.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/02/755e4-img_3469.jpg" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Hiking the Green Isle</span></a></em></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Another great location clouded by Yunnan Gardens is </span><b>Jurong Eco Garden</b><span style="font-weight: 400;">,</span> <span style="font-weight: 400;">which sits right at the edge of NTU. It’s the oasis of an otherwise industrial area, with a swamp, a butterfly garden, and a handful of interesting sculptures here and there.</span></p>
<p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-249148" src="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-7.png" alt="NTU - Jurong Eco Garden" width="1999" height="1047" srcset="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-7.png 1999w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-7-300x157.png 300w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-7-1024x536.png 1024w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-7-150x79.png 150w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-7-768x402.png 768w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-7-1536x804.png 1536w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-7-690x361.png 690w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-7-955x500.png 955w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-7-310x162.png 310w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-7-400x210.png 400w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-7-210x110.png 210w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-7-90x47.png 90w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-7-480x251.png 480w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1999px) 100vw, 1999px" /><br />
Image adapted from: </span><a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CIDoKo9BMMS/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">@lovetravelswenn</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">, </span><a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CIr-lTcllrc/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">@imiaowgination</span></a></em></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Other park-goers frequent this garden for bird-watching and wildlife spotting – apparently, a family of wild boars has even been spotted here. </span></p>
<p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="alignnone wp-image-249149 size-full" src="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-9.png" alt="NTU hidden gems - Jurong Lake Gardens" width="1474" height="1468" srcset="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-9.png 1474w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-9-300x300.png 300w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-9-1024x1020.png 1024w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-9-150x150.png 150w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-9-768x765.png 768w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-9-65x65.png 65w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-9-462x460.png 462w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-9-502x500.png 502w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-9-261x260.png 261w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-9-301x300.png 301w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-9-141x140.png 141w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-9-70x70.png 70w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-9-335x334.png 335w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1474px) 100vw, 1474px" /><br />
I know, cute right? But let’s not disrupt their ecosystem by feeding or touching them.<br />
</span><span style="font-weight: 400;">Image credit: </span><a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/COxPDT0nhMg/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">@wesley_wong_jh</span></a></em></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Do note that there are multiple dormitories here, so please mind your volume when you visit the garden.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="color: #d47978;"><b>Address</b></span><strong><span style="color: #d47978;">:</span></strong> </span><span style="font-weight: 400;">1 Cleantech Loop Cleantech One, Singapore 637141</span></p>
<hr />
<h3><b>6. Campus Art Trail with 57 unique artworks</b></h3>
<hr />
<p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="alignnone wp-image-249150 size-full" src="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-14.png" alt="NTU hidden gems - Campus Art Trail" width="1999" height="1047" srcset="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-14.png 1999w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-14-300x157.png 300w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-14-1024x536.png 1024w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-14-150x79.png 150w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-14-768x402.png 768w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-14-1536x804.png 1536w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-14-690x361.png 690w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-14-955x500.png 955w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-14-310x162.png 310w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-14-400x210.png 400w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-14-210x110.png 210w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-14-90x47.png 90w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-14-480x251.png 480w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1999px) 100vw, 1999px" />Image adapted from: NTU </span><a href="https://www.explorest.com/places/singapore/western-water-catchment/nanyang-technological-university-school-of-art-design-media-adm-look-down" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">@j9ryl</span></a></em></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">If you want to tour the whole campus, try following the </span><b>Campus Art Trail</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> which features 57 artworks from a range of genres like installations, </span><span style="font-weight: 400;">sculptures, architecture, and new media.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">This </span><a href="https://virtualtours.ntu.edu.sg/Museum/ntucampusarttrail/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">map of the Campus Art Trail</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> will take you to each of them in NTU, which you can access by foot or shuttle bus. We’ve previously covered some handy tips on how to navigate NTU’s shuttle bus system in these </span><a href="https://thesmartlocal.com/read/ntu-hacks/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">hacks for NTU students</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">. </span></p>
<hr />
<h3 style="text-align: center;"><b>– Food –</b></h3>
<hr />
<h3><b>7. $2.50 Bak Chor Mee at NIE Canteen</b></h3>
<hr />
<p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="alignnone wp-image-249151 size-full" src="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-13.png" alt="NTU hidden gems - Bak Chor Mee" width="645" height="645" srcset="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-13.png 645w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-13-300x300.png 300w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-13-150x150.png 150w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-13-65x65.png 65w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-13-460x460.png 460w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-13-500x500.png 500w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-13-260x260.png 260w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-13-140x140.png 140w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-13-70x70.png 70w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-13-334x334.png 334w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 645px) 100vw, 645px" /><br />
Image credit: </span><a href="https://www.burpple.com/f/q2rcSqHt" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Shaun Sim</span></a></em></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">The best </span><b>Bak Chor Mee</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> in NTU, or as some students have dared to say, the West, is right here in the National Institute of Education. The noodle stall is easily identifiable by its extremely long queue, which also means that it bodes better if you can snag a bowl early. </span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Fans of the minced pork noodle here have raved that the </span><i><span style="font-weight: 400;">mee </span></i><span style="font-weight: 400;">is springy and the vinegar sauce is just right. And all this for just </span><b>$2.50</b><span style="font-weight: 400;">. Cheap and good, the way food should be. </span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="color: #d47978;"><b>Address</b></span><strong><span style="color: #d47978;">:</span></strong> 1 Nanyang Walk, Singapore 637616  </span></p>
<hr />
<h3><b>8. Japanese rice bowls at Connect71 Cafe</b></h3>
<hr />
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="alignnone wp-image-249152 size-full" src="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-5.png" alt="NTU hidden gems - Connect71" width="1500" height="1002" srcset="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-5.png 1500w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-5-300x200.png 300w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-5-1024x684.png 1024w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-5-150x100.png 150w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-5-768x513.png 768w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-5-690x460.png 690w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-5-749x500.png 749w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-5-310x207.png 310w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-5-400x267.png 400w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-5-210x140.png 210w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-5-90x60.png 90w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-5-480x321.png 480w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1500px) 100vw, 1500px" /><br />
</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Although </span><b>Connect71</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> is arguably one of the buzzier cafes in NTU, it is relatively hidden in the heart of NTU’s Innovation Centre. Still, the student-owned cafe rakes in quite the crowd with its minimalist aesthetic and modern Japanese rice bowls.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Price points here are relatively cheaper than your typical Japanese eatery, and its best-selling </span><b>Gyudon</b><span style="font-weight: 400;">, or beef rice bowl, goes for </span><b>$9</b><span style="font-weight: 400;">. If you’re up for a tea time treat, there are also an array of cakes and coffees here. </span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="color: #d47978;"><b>Address</b></span><strong><span style="color: #d47978;">:</span></strong> 71 Nanyang Drive, #03-23, NTU Innovation Centre, Singapore 638075</span></p>
<hr />
<h3><b>9. $2.50 Ice Cream Waffles at Canteen 11</b></h3>
<hr />
<p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="alignnone wp-image-249153 size-full" src="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-12.jpg" alt="NTU hidden gems - Ice Cream Waffles" width="826" height="827" srcset="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-12.jpg 826w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-12-300x300.jpg 300w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-12-150x150.jpg 150w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-12-768x769.jpg 768w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-12-65x65.jpg 65w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-12-459x460.jpg 459w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-12-499x500.jpg 499w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-12-260x260.jpg 260w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-12-140x140.jpg 140w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-12-70x70.jpg 70w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-12-334x334.jpg 334w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 826px) 100vw, 826px" /><br />
Image credit: </span><a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CLbi2dznuBY/?hl=en" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">@food.plis</span></a></em></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">If you smell something sweet coming from </span><b>Canteen 11</b><span style="font-weight: 400;">, it’s probably the aroma of freshly made waffle batter emanating from the waffle shop. Their waffles start at a modest base price of</span><b> $1.10</b><span style="font-weight: 400;">, so you can build your dream waffle with a variety of ice cream flavours and toppings.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="color: #d47978;"><b>Address</b></span><strong><span style="color: #d47978;">:</span></strong> 20 Nanyang Avenue, Nanyang Technological University, Singapore 639809</span></p>
<hr />
<h3><b>10. The Tea Party at The Arc</b></h3>
<hr />
<p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="alignnone wp-image-249154 size-full" src="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-3.png" alt="NTU hidden gems - The Tea Party" width="1142" height="1260" srcset="https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-3.png 1142w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-3-272x300.png 272w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-3-928x1024.png 928w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-3-136x150.png 136w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-3-768x847.png 768w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-3-417x460.png 417w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-3-453x500.png 453w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-3-236x260.png 236w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-3-127x140.png 127w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-3-63x70.png 63w, https://thesmartlocal.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/NTU-hidden-gems-3-303x334.png 303w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1142px) 100vw, 1142px" /><br />
Image credit: </span><a href="https://www.burpple.com/f/uHy4-g_P" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Yang Xunsheng</span></a></em></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">While </span><b>The Tea Party</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> is a common sight among the local <em>Us</em>, its NTU outlet is probably the least patronised since it is hidden in The Arc’s basement floor. </span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">However, if you’re tired of the usual western stall menu, The Tea Party serves quite a range of food from </span><b>Chilli Beef Fries ($6.60)</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> to </span><b>Butterscotch Milk ($4.50)</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> to </span><b>Pinky Pasta ($6.50)</b><span style="font-weight: 400;">.</span></p>
<p><span style="color: #d47978;"><b>Address</b></span><span style="font-weight: 400;"><strong><span style="color: #d47978;">:</span></strong><span style="color: #000000;"> 63 Nanyang Drive #B1-01 The Arc, Singapore 636922</span></span></p>
<hr />
<h3><b>Check out these hidden gems in NTU</b></h3>
<hr />
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">See, who says you need big brains to attend a local uni? Just hop on a campus shuttle bus and get to exploring NTU’s hidden gems. Quickly now, before the semester restarts in August!</span></p>
